# Liberty Moves Orlando

> Licensed, insured, family-run moving company based in the Orlando, FL metro
> (Casselberry HQ). Local, long-distance, residential, commercial, and packing
> moves across all of Central Florida. Upfront written binding quotes, careful
> uniformed crews, 5-star rated. USDOT 3455436 · FLDACS IM3347.

## About

Liberty Moves Orlando is a moving company serving the greater Orlando / Central
Florida area. The same crew that loads your truck unloads it — including on
long-distance moves (no warehouse transfers or third-party handlers). Every
quote is written, itemized, and binding: no surprise fuel, stair, or long-carry
fees. 98% of local Orlando moves finish same-day, 7 days a week.

- Name: Liberty Moves Orlando
- Phone: (407) 641-2887
- Email: info@libertymovesorlando.com
- Address: 3641 S Saint Lucie Dr, Casselberry, FL 32707
- License: USDOT 3455436, FLDACS IM3347
- Rating: 5.0 stars (300+ reviews)
- Hours: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM, 7 days/week

## Services

- Local Movers — same-week moves across Orlando & Central Florida, hourly upfront pricing: https://libertymovesorlando.com/local-movers
- Residential Moving — homes, apartments, condos, full-service single-day moves: https://libertymovesorlando.com/residential-moving
- Commercial Moving — offices, retail, warehouses, weekend moves: https://libertymovesorlando.com/commercial-moving
- Long-Distance Moving — Florida to anywhere in the U.S., dedicated trucks: https://libertymovesorlando.com/long-distance-moving
- Packing Services — professional packing + materials at cost: https://libertymovesorlando.com/packing-services
- Orlando Moving Cost guide & calculator: https://libertymovesorlando.com/orlando-moving-cost

## Service area

Orlando metro and Central Florida, including Winter Park, Kissimmee, Altamonte
Springs, Lake Mary, Apopka, Oviedo, Sanford, Windermere, Celebration, St. Cloud,
Davenport, Gotha, Montverde, Winter Garden, College Park, Maitland, Winter
Springs, and Casselberry — across Orange, Seminole, Osceola, Lake, and Polk
counties.

## Typical local move pricing

- Studio / 1 BR apartment: $400–$750 (2 movers, 3–4 hrs)
- 2 BR apartment / small home: $650–$1,100 (2–3 movers, 4–6 hrs)
- 3 BR home: $1,200–$1,800 (3 movers, 6–8 hrs)
- 4+ BR home: $1,800–$2,400 (3–4 movers, 8–10 hrs)
- Long-distance: priced by weight + distance, binding written estimate.

Call or text (407) 641-2887, email info@libertymovesorlando.com, or request a
free written quote at https://libertymovesorlando.com/contact-us.
